prediction.reasoning: For a 1-day prediction of AMZN stock, I used historical daily volatility patterns typical for large-cap tech stocks. AMZN typically exhibits daily volatility of approximately 2-3%. The point estimate assumes no systematic directional bias for such a short timeframe. Confidence intervals are constructed using assumed daily standard deviation of ~1.8%, with appropriate z-scores: 50% CI (±0.67σ), 80% CI (±1.28σ), 90% CI (±1.64σ). This reflects the high uncertainty inherent in short-term stock price movements.
